content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于3月23日21:25(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年4月6日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
● 调整了即将开放的部分内容细节，不影响当前已开放的内容。

V2.4.3.4 Online Maintenance Announcement

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on March 23 at 21:25(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
  
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
  
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on April 6, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
  
[Update Content]
● Adjusted some details of upcoming content, with no impact on currently available content.
